boot.context: <button id="drama-dial-chip" title="Drama sensitivity — controls which games surface as One To Watch. Tap to adjust in My Services." onclick="(function(){document.getElementById('settings-btn')?.click
setTimeout(() => { try { if (typeof loadBriefQualityRow === 'function') loadBriefQualityRow(); } catch(_) {} }, 120);
// Runs after renderAll() with 500ms delay to let async injections settle.
// Populated by fetchScheduleData() before buildTodaySchedule() runs.
// Always stop live pollers when leaving today — fetchSchedule() restarts them if returning
await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1300)); // SR trial rate limit: 1 req/sec
// ~500ms of each other, each triggering a full renderAll() + DOM rebuild (~77KB
// Solution: data-arrival paths call scheduleRenderAll() instead of renderAll().
//   - User-interaction paths (filter clicks, date nav, TZ change) call renderAll()
// into renderAll() output. Ported from a ChatGPT-authored proposal
// interaction paths (filter clicks, date nav, TZ change) call renderAll()
// renderAll()'s own body -- it runs on its own independent 90s poll
// Preserve #field-newspaper across schedule re-renders. renderAll() calls
// Run after renderAll() — derives the conflicts from the same flat game
// (non-scheduleRenderAll) renderAll() call, which clears the whole cache
// consolidate). renderAll() re-runs every ~15-30s poll cycle and on filter
// reallocated on every single renderAll() call for no reason.
// through scheduleRenderAll -- direct renderAll() callers (filter clicks,
setTimeout(initEPLMatchBriefs, 700);  // J7: EPL + MLS + Bundesliga match briefs
setTimeout(renderFinalsDesk,  1050);  // J11: Finals Desk daily analytical piece (NBA/NHL Finals)
setTimeout(initWNBAGameBriefs,1300);  // J9: WNBA game brief (standings + matchup)
setTimeout(updateCardLifeStages, 200); // Update life stages after cards render
setTimeout(renderScoreTicker, 250);   // Render score ticker if games are live
setTimeout(injectJ1J4Badges, 300);    // J1/J4: Anti-Hype + Scout's Pick per-card badges
setTimeout(injectWeatherBadges, 300); // re-apply wx badges from cache after render
setTimeout(renderArbitrageBar, 400);   // arbitrage bar — after schedule renders
setTimeout(renderAmbientPanel, 1200); // ambient panel — after schedule renders
setTimeout(() => injectWikiChips().catch(() => {}), 1500); // wiki trending chips — guard unhandled rejection
// Called in buildTodaySchedule() before pushing to sections.
// Called from renderAll() + after odds load. Idempotent.
// Previously referenced in renderAll() and fetchESPNStandings() but never declared, causing
// a ReferenceError on every renderAll() call that crashed the entire schedule render.
for(const f of fetches){ await f; await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,150)); }
// games sat in espnScores forever, never rendered by renderAll(). Unlike
// (wnbaGames, buildTodaySchedule()) whose dates stop at June 28, so it
// Wrapped in try-catch: must NEVER throw or fetchSchedule() below is blocked.
} catch(e_mid_outer) {} // swallow — must not block fetchSchedule()
// paying for a full renderAll() rebuild on every refresh.
setTimeout(refreshMLBStatus, 10000); // first check: 10s after load (after initial fixtures settle)
// Update .game-time (card-right score display) — baked at renderAll() time with
// Called with 1500ms timeout before buildTodaySchedule() so fast connections
// fetchSchedule() ever populates allData.sports. So this cannot run inside
// renderNewspaper(bundle) itself — it's called from renderAll() below,
// Idempotent — safe to call from end of renderAll() on every paint. Reads
setTimeout(poll, 5000);    // first check: 5s after load (after MLB fills in)
setTimeout(fetchSoccerFixtures, 500); // no-op with empty SOCCER_LEAGUES (all soccer on V2)
setTimeout(fetchMLSLive, 800);         // MLS relay: stats-api.mlssoccer.com → canonical opta_id keys in espnScores
setTimeout(slashGolfPrefetchAll, 3500); // Slash Golf: schedule + live leaderboard
setTimeout(fetchATPLiveScores, 4500);  // ATP Tour live scores (CORS open, no proxy needed)
setTimeout(bdlPrefetchAll, 2000);       // BallDontLie injury prefetch (after schedule renders)
setTimeout(uflEpaInit, 3500);           // UFL EPA live: SR PBP → EPA per play (self-gating, silent on fail)
setTimeout(mlbStatsInit, 4000);         // MLB stats: load weekly Savant tables (patches hardcoded stubs)
setTimeout(mlbProbablePitcherInit, 4100);  // MLB pitchers phase 1: schedule → pitcher IDs
setTimeout(mlbPitcherStatsInit, 4300);     // MLB pitchers phase 2: stats for all tonight's starters
setTimeout(nhlSeriesInit, 4600);        // NHL series PP%/PK% from R2 (overlays NHL_SPECIAL_TEAMS)
setTimeout(nbaCluichInit, 4700);        // NBA clutch DRTG from R2 (fills null fields in NBA_TEAM_ANALYTICS)
setTimeout(nbaPlayerCluichInit, 4750);    // NBA player clutch (live /leaguedashplayerclutch → patches NBA_CLUTCH_PLAYERS)
setTimeout(nhlGSAXInit, 4800);          // NHL GSAX from MoneyPuck R2 (upgrades NHL_GOALIE_RATINGS from save% proxy)
setTimeout(nhlAnalyticsInit, 4500);     // NHL analytics: set _homeAbbr/_awayAbbr/_sport on NHL game objects
setTimeout(nhlPlayoffLeadersPrefetch, 3000); // Phase B subtask 9: NHL playoff leaders feed (15-min TTL)
setTimeout(nbaPlayoffLeadersPrefetch, 3100); // ADR-003: NBA playoff leaders via /nba-stats/leagueLeaders (15-min TTL)
setTimeout(espnInjuriesPrefetch, 3200);      // ESPN injuries (NHL + NBA league-wide; 30-min TTL)
// bootNewspaper() and fetchSchedule() run in parallel — newspaper may not exist
// PREVIOUSLY trapped inside fetchSchedule() — functions were NOT globally
// Filter state vars must be initialized before goToDate() triggers buildFilters()/renderAll()
// Boot wires setTimeout(fetchUserState, 2000) after first render so the
setTimeout(_connect, 500); // slight delay to let page finish init
if(!allData){ setTimeout(initMLBGameBriefs, 2500); return; } // retry if data not ready
if(!allData){ setTimeout(initWNBAGameBriefs, 2500); return; } // retry if data not ready
if(!allData){ setTimeout(initStakesBriefs, 2500); return; } // retry if data not ready
setTimeout(_bsdActivateForWC, 500); // defer 500ms — let V2 poll populate espnScores first
// allData.sports, the same source renderAll() reads from, so this always
//   1. After renderAll() so score-wraps render with real scores
// fetchSchedule() populates allData from buildTodaySchedule() then calls renderAll()
// Kick: restore first (paints cached DOM if any), then fetchSchedule (which renderAll-replaces with fresh).
